summary: Made a surgical opening adjustment to anchor the chapter directly after the tribunal scene and echo the prior chapter's final decision to answer, while preserving the existing exit into the ferry-terminal long haul that chapter 18 picks up.
edits: Anchored the opening at six-thirty that evening to tighten the handoff from chapter 16.
Reframed the opening pivot around answering the crisis so the tribunal win collapses straight into the support shutdown.
